title: Exitian Tweaks
description: A small number of (configurable) tweaks to base minecraft.
body:
## 🌍 Overview
Exitian Tweaks is a comprehensive and flexible tool for Minecraft mod or pack dev's who want to adjust the gameplay experience to their needs.
Offering a variety of features that changes various mechanics, providing players or mod & pack dev's with the ability to modify game mechanics and do things differently!

## 🤺 For who it is and isn't
✅
This mod is for modpack or datapack dev's who want to adjust aspects of either to their liking and want functionality that can be toggled.

❌
It isn't for those who want a quick "*install and play*" as this mod is meant to be adjusted. And barely does anything with default settings.

## ⏬ Installation and settings

Installing ExitianTweaks requires [NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/) version 21.0.40-beta or higher.

Drag and drop this mod into your "mods" folder in your desired modded minecraft directory after installing NeoForge into that instance. And you're good to go!

You can click the "Mods" button on the main or escape-menu to go to the general settings and adjust them.
You can also adjust the configuration after your first time loading up.

---
## 🔑 Key Features

### 💀 **Totem of Undying from Inventory**
- Enables the Totem of Undying to function directly from your inventory.
   
Including an item-tag to give this functionality to **any** other item of your liking!

### 🟢 **Remove XP and hide the XP bar**
   
- Completely remove experience and the UI that accompanies it!

  With full compatibility with AppleSkin!

### 🛒 **Change Minecart maximum speed**
- Adjust the maximum speed of minecarts to whatever you want.
  
  *Beware that higher values than default will also give you a higher and higher chance of derailment!*
   
### 💝🍗 **Change the height your hearts, armor and hunger bar**
- Modify the vertical position of the food and hunger bar on the screen.
   
   Allowing for better compat between mods fully adjustable pixel-by-pixel.

   Comes with AppleSkin compatibility! Allowing you to see the overlay it adds!


### 🔥 **Set the Player on Fire for Holding Hot Items**
- Introduce a realistic challenge by setting the player on fire when holding hot items based on item tags. Adding a bit more difficulty for those who think holding a bucket of lava may just be a tad too unrealistic!

### 📌 **Prevent Copper and Iron large carver ore nodes**
- Prevent the spawning of large ore nodes for copper and iron.
  
  (Previously a [seperate mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/largeorenodesremove) of mine!)

### 🟪 **Disable Nether Portal Formation**
- Prevent the formation of Nether Portals.
  
  Forcing either a way through other methods. Or disabling the nether entirely!

### 🦜 **Disable Initial Narrator Screen**
- Skip the initial narrator screen for a quicker game startup.
- Without actually disabling the narrator! It is also off by default.

This is intended for pack use. Where you end up deleting your configs at times. Sometimes a lot!

### 🧯 **Make any item immune to Fire and Lava based on an item-tag**
Protect specific items from fire and lava damage based on item tags.

### 🔮 **Prevent hostiles from spawning including the Ender Dragon and Wither!**
Prevent bosses, hostiles, slimes from spawning. And the wither from being formed!
Perfect if you want to have players worry about food, but not about mobs!

### 👑 **Allow survival CommandBlock use!**
Allowing survival players to use command blocks. Or disabling it for *everyone*.
Just in-case you want a fun new end-game block or item for the player.
Using vanilla behaviour! Cannot be placed unless both are on!
 
---

### 💻 For Developers
Exitian Tweaks comes with various item-tags.

These are all registed in the "c" default namespace for fabric and neoforge.

- "#c:death_preventables"
  
  Added to an item prevents player death. (By default only applies to the Totem of Undying)
---
- "#c:will_burn_players" 
  
  Will apply lava damage to the player holding the item. (By default only has the Lava Bucket)
---
- "#c:heat_resistant_items" 
  
  No longer will items be burnable or vanish into the ether by touching a bit of fire. (By default only has the Lava Bucket)

---

### 🧭 Compatability
Any mod or datapack adding these tags to their item while this mod is installed will make them work. Notably KubeJS is (indirectly) supported!

Any other mod adding any of these features is soft-incompatible.

If you want their over my own functionality you can disable or adjust everything in the config or config menu!

### ❗❗❗ Issues and Support

Visit my [github](https://github.com/3x1t-5tyl3/ExitianTweaks)

Discord might be available if there's a want or need for it.
